self:fastapi+mongodb:book-crud.content:
from fastapi import FastAPI, HTTPException, Depends
from motor.motor_asyncio import AsyncIOMotorClient
from pydantic.v2 import BaseModel, Field
from typing import List, Optional

app = FastAPI()

# MongoDB setup
client = AsyncIOMotorClient("mongodb://localhost:27017")
db = client["library"]
books_collection = db["books"]

class Book(BaseModel):
    title: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
    author: str = Field(..., min_length=1)
    description: Optional[str] = None

async def get_book(id: str):
    book = await books_collection.find_one({"_id": id})
    if not book:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Book not found")
    return book

@app.post("/books", response_model=Book)
async def create_book(book: Book):
    result = await books_collection.insert_one(book.model_dump())
    created_book = await get_book(str(result.inserted_id))
    return created_book

@app.get("/books", response_model=List[Book])
async def read_books():
    cursor = books_collection.find()
    books = [book async for book in cursor]
    return books

@app.put("/books/{id}", response_model=Book)
async def update_book(id: str, book: Book):
    await books_collection.update_one({"_id": id}, {"$set": book.model_dump()})
    updated_book = await get_book(id)
    return updated_book

@app.delete("/books/{id}", status_code=204)
async def delete_book(id: str):
    result = await books_collection.delete_one({"_id": id})
    if result.deleted_count == 0:
        raise HTTPException(status_code=404, detail="Book not found")
